costs_slippage.note: Repository qfa backtester currently has no transaction-cost/slippage/turnover arguments or calculations, so reported metrics are pre-cost. The alpha is daily re-evaluated and likely cost-sensitive; acceptance should require turnover-based cost haircut before capital allocation.

data.price_adjustment_note: qfa uses the repository AlpacaGateway stock bars request; no explicit adjusted-price flag is exposed in this repo version.

decision_rationale: Main-window Sharpe is positive (0.9827) and random-window median Sharpe is positive (0.7390), so the AR-016 falsifier is not triggered; however, edge is moderate, costs are not modeled, and parent return correlation is not negligible.

orthogonality_checks.interpretation: moderate positive overlap with AR-003; mechanism is cross-sectional basket rotation rather than single-asset TSMOM, but return stream is not fully orthogonal.
orthogonality_checks.method: Pearson correlation of daily equity returns from retained qfa run JSON equity curves over overlapping timestamps.

qfa.command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run models/xsec-etf-defensive-rotation-v1/model.py --symbols SPY,QQQ,IWM,XLV,XLY,XLE,XLU,XLP,TLT,IEF,GLD --start 2023-01-01 --end 2025-12-31 --db /tmp/qfa-ar016-<pid>.sqlite3
qfa.data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; --data-csv was not used
qfa.db_retention_note: Temporary SQLite DB files were removed after extracting JSON results; durable artifacts retain compact evaluation JSON/Markdown only.
qfa.random_window_command_template: same qfa backtest run command with sampled --start/--end values and shared temporary /tmp/qfa-ar016-random.sqlite3 DB

random_period_protocol.method: Six deterministic pseudo-random subwindows sampled across 2023-2025, each run through qfa with Alpaca real market data and no --data-csv.

turnover.method: Ex-post target-weight turnover reconstructed by replaying generate_signals on Alpaca bars; one_way_turnover = 0.5 * sum(abs(w_t - w_{t-1})); qfa does not natively store trades/turnover.

warnings: Metrics are pre-cost because qfa lacks transaction-cost/slippage support in this repository version.
No trades were placed and no daemon was run.
This is research output, not investment advice.
